hooks.prompt:
📋 REMINDER: Conventional Commits Format

<type>(<scope>): <description>

Examples:
- feat(podcast): Add guest identification wizard
- fix(auth): Resolve OAuth redirect mismatch
- docs(readme): Update setup instructions
- test(e2e): Add Playwright tests for OAuth flow

ALWAYS include co-authorship:
🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

hooks.command:
jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -q 'supabase.*migration\|npx supabase migration' && echo '⚠️  MIGRATION DETECTED!

Safety Checklist:
✅ RLS policies defined for new tables?
✅ SECURITY DEFINER functions reviewed?
✅ Migration tested locally first?
✅ Rollback plan documented?
✅ No PII in migration (passwords, tokens, etc.)?
' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE '\.(backup|bak|old|~)$' && echo '❌ BLOCKED: Manual backup files violate "Git is backup" principle.

Instead, use Git:
- git show HEAD~1:path/to/file (view previous version)
- git checkout <commit> -- path/to/file (restore version)
- git diff HEAD~1 path/to/file (compare changes)
- Create feature branch for experiments
' && exit 1 || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -q '^git checkout' && echo '
📍 Branch switched!

Reminder:
1. Update WORK_QUEUE.md status to 🟢 ATIVA
2. Run: git pull origin main (sync with latest)
3. Check for active work: git log main..HEAD --oneline
' || true

attribution.commit:
🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
